Hero.heading: Home
Hero.description: Your trusted partner in Geneva for a smooth relocation : housing and tenant search, corporate services, and personalized support at every stage of your journey.

ContactFeature.heading: Offers
ContactFeature.description: A flawless client experience and turnkey support to help you find your new home, ease your move, and feel at home as quickly as possible.

reasonItems.title: Property Search
reasonItems.description: Following an initial discovery meeting, we take the time to carefully select properties that perfectly match your needs, preferences, and criteria.

reasonItems.title: Accompanied viewings and remote visits
reasonItems.description: We organize your property visits and accompany you to provide a professional perspective. If you’re at a distance, we also offer detailed virtual tours.

reasonItems.title: Administrative support and follow-up
reasonItems.description: We work with you to prepare your application file to maximize your chances and stay by your side until the final lease is signed.

reasonItems.title: Premium Concierge Services
reasonItems.description: Bank account opening, home insurance, rent guarantee, or any other specific request, our concierge service is here to simplify your procedures and lighten your daily load.

StatsGrid.heading: Availability & Transparency
StatsGrid.subHeading: An agency by your side through every step of your relocation.
StatsGrid.description: Relocation Genevoise is at your service to make your move simple and stress-free, offering clear advice, genuine commitment, and personalized services to ensure a smooth and successful relocation.

EngagementFeature.heading: Our Commitments
EngagementFeature.subHeading: Guiding you to your new home with care and expertise.
EngagementFeature.description: Our team is committed to supporting you with excellence and integrity to ensure a smooth and successful relocation to Switzerland.

reasonItems.title: Commitment
reasonItems.description: Dedicated support and a commitment to meeting your needs at every stage.

reasonItems.title: Expertise
reasonItems.description: Tailored advice and precise solutions for a successful relocation.

reasonItems.title: Transparency
reasonItems.description: Trust-based relationships with our clients and partners.

reasonItems.title: Excellence
reasonItems.description: Personalized services and continuous support to ensure an excellent outcome.

ContentWithImg.heading: A trusted partner
ContentWithImg.subHeading: Choose the leading relocation provider in Geneva.

description.paragraph: Relocation Genevoise supports its clients with all direct and indirect aspects of the relocation process in the Geneva area. Our expertise in real estate and in-depth knowledge of the local market allow us to provide comprehensive support and high-quality service.

ServiceFeature.heading: Your relocation to Geneva
ServiceFeature.subHeading: Find your new home in Geneva easily and quickly.
ServiceFeature.description: Simplify your search for the perfect home in Switzerland with our specialized services and a wide range of offers tailored to your needs.

Hero.heading: Your relocation project
Hero.description: A comprehensive, tailor-made solution to find your ideal home in Geneva, handle all your procedures with ease, and ensure a smooth, worry-free move.

items.title: Discovery meeting
items.description: An initial discussion to understand your needs, criteria, and personal situation, so we can jointly define the most relevant search strategy and offer you bespoke support.

items.title: Preparation of your application file
items.description: We prepare a strong, attractive application file for you—aligned with landlords’ expectations—to maximize your chances of securing a home quickly.

items.title: Market analysis
items.description: Using our tools and network, we analyze available listings in real time based on your criteria, taking into account local market dynamics and opportunities that match your profile and priorities.

items.title: Property proposals
items.description: We send you a curated list of properties that meet your criteria, helping you focus your viewings on the homes best suited to your project.

items.title: Visit scheduling
items.description: We schedule viewings around your availability, coordinating between you, landlords, and agencies to simplify the process.

items.title: Submission and tracking of your application
items.description: We submit your application to agencies or landlords and maintain rigorous follow-up, including reminders and interventions as needed to expedite approval.

items.title: Administrative formalities
items.description: We guide you through all necessary administrative steps, reviewing and signing your lease, setting up insurance and guarantees, and handling other essential procedures.

items.title: Move-in assistance
items.description: We assist you with the practical organization of your move-in: coordinating the move, setting up essential services (internet, electricity), and providing personalized recommendations to help you settle in smoothly.

items.title: Post-move support
items.description: Our support continues after your move: offering advice, managing initial needs, and assisting with any issues or adjustments needed for your new life in Switzerland.

BookConsultation.heading: We look forward to meeting you
BookConsultation.subHeading: Would you like to benefit from our expertise and services ?
BookConsultation.description: We are at your disposal to discuss your situation and guide you toward solutions tailored to your needs and activities.

Hero.heading: Quick Placement
Hero.description: We help you quickly find a reliable tenant through a comprehensive service: professional photos, rigorous candidate screening, and management of all administrative procedures.

items.title: Professional photos and videos of your property
items.description: We produce high-quality professional photos and videos to showcase your property and capture the attention of potential tenants from the very first impression.

items.title: Listing distribution
items.description: Your property is promoted on major specialized platforms and networks, both in Switzerland and internationally. listings are also sent to our database and to many active clients searching for housing.

items.title: Visit coordination
items.description: We personally organize and conduct visits to your property. during the visits, we highlight your property’s strengths and accurately answer candidates’ questions to spark their interest and help them make a decision.

items.title: Application management and review
items.description: we collect, analyze, and verify each application to present you only with serious, financially reliable, and motivated candidates, following a rigorous, transparent process aligned with your selection criteria.

items.title: Application follow-up
items.description: Once applications are submitted to the agency or landlord, we provide thorough follow-up to ensure a smooth and efficient process right up to the lease signing by the future tenant.

items.title: New tenant !
items.description: Once your new tenant is selected, we assist you in finalizing the administrative procedures to ensure a smooth and well-organized move-in.

content.paragraph:
**Company Name:** AG Assurance Genevoise SA 
 **Legal Form:** Public Limited Company (SA) 
 **Registered Office:** Rue des Alpes 5, 1201 Geneva, Switzerland 
 **UID Number:** CHE-403.737.582 
 **FINMA Registry Number:** F01502264 
 **Share Capital:** CHF 100,000 
 **Phone:** +41 22 715 17 45 
 **Email:** contact@assurance-genevoise.ch 
 **Hosting Provider:** o2switch ([[https://www.o2switch.fr/|https://www.o2switch.fr/]]) 
 This information is provided clearly and completely.

AG Assurance Genevoise SA strives to provide accurate and up-to-date information on this website. However, it does not guarantee the accuracy, reliability, or completeness of the information provided. The company reserves the right to modify the website content at any time without prior notice.
AG Assurance Genevoise SA disclaims all liability for direct or indirect damages resulting from access to or use of this website, including damages caused by viruses or technical errors.

This website may contain links to other websites. AG Assurance Genevoise SA is not responsible for the content of these external sites and disclaims all liability regarding the information, products, or services they offer.
All content on this website (texts, images, logos, etc.) is protected by copyright. Any reproduction, distribution, or use without prior written authorization is prohibited.

content.title: Data Collection and Processing
content.paragraph: We collect and process personal data in accordance with the new Federal Act on Data Protection (nFADP). The data collected may include, but is not limited to, name, address, email address, and phone number. This data is used to provide our services, respond to inquiries, and enhance user experience.

content.title: Use of Google Analytics
content.paragraph: This website uses Google Analytics, a web analytics service provided by Google Inc. Google Analytics uses cookies to help analyze website usage. Information generated by the cookies regarding your use of the website will be transmitted to and stored by Google.

content.title: User Rights
content.paragraph: In accordance with the nFADP, you have the right to access your personal data, rectify it, request its deletion, or object to its processing. To exercise these rights, please contact us at the email address provided above.

content.title: Data Security
content.paragraph: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, loss, or destruction.

This website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can configure your browser to refuse cookies or to notify you when a cookie is sent. However, some website features may not function properly without the use of cookies.
This legal notice is governed by Swiss law. In the event of a dispute, the courts of the Canton of Geneva shall have exclusive jurisdiction.
AG Assurance Genevoise SA reserves the right to modify this legal notice at any time. Changes will take effect upon publication on the website.

At **RG Relocation Genevoise SA**, we place great importance on respecting your privacy. We thank you for using our services and website. We take the protection of your privacy seriously. This privacy policy applies to any individual sharing their personal data directly or indirectly with RG Relocation Genevoise SA when visiting this website.

**RG Relocation Genevoise SA** is a corporation established in Switzerland and registered at Rue des Alpes 5, 1201 Geneva. As such, we comply with the nLPD (new Swiss Data Protection Act). Our head office is located at Rue des Alpes 5, 1201 Geneva. You can address your data protection inquiries to the following email: [[contact@relocation-genevoise.ch]]. This privacy policy outlines the types of personal data that may be processed and their intended purposes.

Please note that this privacy policy pertains to the processing of personal data for which RG Relocation Genevoise SA acts as the data controller. This privacy policy does not cover any personal data processing that RG Relocation Genevoise SA may perform as a data processor resulting from your use of our services.For more information on how our services can be used to facilitate your personal data processing and on RG Relocation Genevoise SA’s responsibilities and commitments in this context, please refer to the applicable terms and conditions. We adhere to the nLPD (new Swiss Data Protection Act) across all our procedures.

Personal data refers to data that identifies you as an individual. We may process the following types of personal data about you: your contact details, which may include your name, email address, and phone number; user information, such as when you log in to our service or visit our websites, which may include your IP address, device type and browser, time zone, geographical location, as well as your interests and preferences; and interaction data, which includes information about how you interact with our services, such as the features used and the buttons clicked.

sections.title: Sharing with third parties and transfer to third countries

content.paragraph:
• Google Analytics: Allows for the analysis of traffic on the website [[https://relocation-genevoise.ch/|https://relocation-genevoise.ch/]]
 • Google Tag Manager: A tag management system that enables marketers to easily add tags (Analytics, remarketing, etc.) to their website.
We are obligated to process personal data that is accurate, relevant, and necessary while considering our legitimate purposes. You have the right to oversee this.
To update the personal data we process about you, please contact us at [[contact@relocation-genevoise.ch]].

To receive a free extract of the personal data we process about you, you can send us a registered letter at the following address: RG Relocation Genevoise SA, Rue des Alpes 5, 1201 Geneva, Switzerland.

Education.heading: Our service
Education.description: A tailor-made educational solution to guide you toward the ideal institution that supports your children’s growth, well-being, and academic success.

content.paragraph: Moving to Switzerland with children involves important decisions regarding education. We guide you every step of the way — from understanding the school system to choosing the right institutions and managing administrative procedures. Our approach is tailored to your budget, preferred location, education standards, and specific needs.

content.title: Overview of various educational options
content.paragraph: We guide you through the different schooling options in Switzerland, from nurseries to public and private schools, Swiss or international institutions, as well as less conventional alternatives, helping you select the best opportunities for your family’s needs.

content.title: Pre-enrollment and initial formalities
content.paragraph: Our service includes assistance with pre-enrollment procedures, making sure all necessary formalities are correctly handled on your behalf, as parents.

content.title: Meeting organization
content.paragraph: We organize personalized meetings with school representatives, either by phone or in person, giving you the opportunity to ask questions directly and better assess the available options.

content.title: Family assessment
content.paragraph: We offer a debriefing session during which children and parents can share their impressions and refine their choices based on both objective and personal criteria.

content.title: Assistance with final enrollment
content.paragraph: Once your choice is made, we assist you with the final enrollment process, ensuring that all administrative steps are completed smoothly and efficiently.

content.title: Support during school visits
content.paragraph: If needed, we assist you during school visits to review all essential aspects, from the school’s atmosphere to its facilities, and to facilitate communication with the teaching staff.
A comprehensive service to support you at every stage, from the first contact to the successful integration of your child, ensuring peace of mind for the whole family.

BookConsultation.heading: We look forward to meeting you
BookConsultation.subHeading: Would you like to benefit from our expertise and services ?
BookConsultation.description: We are at your disposal to discuss your situation and guide you toward solutions tailored to your needs and activities.

DiscoverGeneva.heading: Our service
DiscoverGeneva.description: A unique and personalized solution to help you find your bearings, explore the neighborhoods, understand the local culture, and feel at home from day one.

content.paragraph: Settling into a new city is a significant step. We make it easier for you to discover Geneva so you can confidently and comfortably make it your own.
Discovering Geneva also means finding the neighborhood that feels right for you. We guide you through this process with a personalized service tailored to your lifestyle and expectations.

content.title: Personalized visit
content.paragraph: Based on your search criteria and lifestyle (proximity to the city center, access to public transport, workplace location, etc.), our agent plans a tailored itinerary that allows you to visit several representative neighborhoods of Geneva and better visualize your future living environment.

content.title: Introduction to local infrastructure and shops
content.paragraph: We introduce you to local shops, parks, schools, sports centers, and other key facilities so you can quickly get your bearings and manage your daily life with ease and independence.

content.title: Personalized recommendations based on your profile
content.paragraph: Depending on your situation — family, expatriate worker, student, or retiree — we suggest neighborhoods and practical reference points that align with your daily life and priorities.

content.title: Discovering cultural and social life
content.paragraph: We guide you through cultural venues, local events, and leisure spaces to help you quickly find your bearings and fully enjoy all that Geneva has to offer.

content.title: Post-visit review
content.paragraph: At the end of the visit, we review everything with you to refine your preferences and identify the neighborhoods that best match your needs and expectations.

BookConsultation.heading: We look forward to meeting you
BookConsultation.subHeading: Would you like to benefit from our expertise and services ?
BookConsultation.description: We are at your disposal to discuss your situation and guide you toward solutions tailored to your needs and activities.

ConciergeService.heading: Our service
ConciergeService.description: From the everyday to the extraordinary, our concierge service is designed to meet all your expectations, providing personalized assistance for every moment of your daily life.

content.paragraph: Our concierge service simplifies your daily life by handling all your requests, even the most specific ones. Urgent need, special project, or a personalized request? We leverage our expertise and a trusted network of partners to provide fast and efficient solutions.

Designed for both individuals and professionals, our service coordinates qualified providers, including electricians, gardeners, cleaners, or specialized contractors. With our personalized and responsive approach, every request is handled with precision, discretion, and professionalism.
Free your mind and save valuable time by entrusting your requests to a flexible, attentive team that’s always ready to adapt to your needs.

BusinessInfo.heading: Professional
BusinessInfo.description: Providing a tailored relocation service in Geneva to facilitate the settlement of your employees and new arrivals. We are committed to making the transition to a new home simple, efficient, and stress-free by offering premium and personalized support, local expertise, and comprehensive administrative assistance to ensure a smooth and swift transition.

subItems.title: Operational Efficiency
subItems.description: Your employees can quickly focus on their new position without the burden of searching for housing on their own or navigating the complexity of Geneva's real estate market.

subItems.title: Cost Reduction
subItems.description: Did you know that individuals spend an average of 50 hours searching for a home? By ensuring this task is a relocation service, this valuable time can be reinvested in high-value activities.

subItems.title: Housing Search
subItems.description: After an initial discovery meeting, we select properties that match your employees’ needs and criteria, such as proximity to the workplace. Unlimited proposals are provided.

subItems.title: Personalized Advice
subItems.description: Guidance on neighborhoods, schools, daycare centers, public transportation, and local services.

subItems.title: Installation and Integration
subItems.description: Assistance with setting up services such as electricity, insurance, housekeeping, and practical advice for adapting to life in Geneva.

subItems.title: Housekeeping
subItems.description: Connection with a trusted partner for household tasks.

subItems.title: Fitness
subItems.description: Guidance to fitness centers and support with registration.

subItems.title: Concierge Services
subItems.description: We are attentive to meet the unique needs of your employees.

subItems.title: Administrative Setup
subItems.description: Assistance in preparing application files to ensure maximum responsiveness in securing housing.

subItems.title: Accompanied Visits
subItems.description: Organization and support during property visits. Pre-visits if necessary and delivery of detailed, professional video walkthroughs.

subItems.title: Post-Rental Service
subItems.description: We remain available to address employees' needs even after their move, ensuring comprehensive and personalized support.

subItems.title: Bank Account Setup
subItems.description: Assistance with opening bank accounts and handling administrative procedures.

subItems.title: Insurance
subItems.description: Personalized advice and assistance with setting up essential insurance contracts (housing, health, etc.) through our Assurance Genevoise office.

subItems.title: Talent Retention
subItems.description: A smooth transition and quality service contribute to employee well-being, increasing their satisfaction and loyalty.

subItems.title: Schooling
subItems.description: Assistance with choosing and enrolling children in suitable educational institutions (public, private, or international schools).

FAQ.heading: FAQ
FAQ.description: Clear and practical answers to support you throughout your relocation project.

faqs.question: What is a relocation agency?
faqs.answer: Relocation is a support service designed for individuals, families, and companies moving to a new region or country. It provides comprehensive assistance by helping you find a home, handle administrative procedures, and organize your move.

faqs.question: What types of housing do you offer?
faqs.answer: We offer a wide selection of properties, from city-center apartments to more spacious houses in suburban areas — tailored to your budget, location, and lifestyle preferences.

faqs.question: How long does the relocation process take?
faqs.answer: The duration varies depending on your specific needs and the local real estate market. However, we aim to make your move as swift as possible. Every project is unique, and we adjust our services accordingly.

faqs.question: What services do you offer?
faqs.answer: We provide a wide range of services, including housing search, administrative support, moving assistance, school search, local orientation, and more.

faqs.question: Do you offer services for businesses?
faqs.answer: Yes, we support companies in Switzerland by helping their employees settle in. We organize housing searches, offer practical administrative solutions, and ensure successful integration into life in Geneva.

faqs.question: How can I start a project with you?
faqs.answer: Contact us via our contact form, by email, or by phone (+41 22 715 17 48). We will schedule an initial meeting to understand your needs and recommend the services best suited to your relocation project.

AssurancePerteExploitation.description: Protect your business against financial losses related to a claim, business stoppage, or forced interruption.

AssuranceCyber.description: Comprehensive protection against cyber incidents to safeguard your systems and data.

AssuranceRcImmeuble.description: Cover material or bodily damages caused to third parties by your building, its equipment, or installations.

AssuranceLibrePassage.description: Maintain your pension rights and protect your LPP assets between jobs or during a professional transition.

AssurancePrevoyance.description: Secure your financial future, protect your loved ones, and ensure a peaceful retirement at every stage of life.

CouverturesSpecifiques.description: Secure your activities worldwide with tailor-made insurance programs; protect your employees, assets and international projects, and grow your business with confidence.

TaxesEtFiscalite.description: Control your taxes, anticipate your liabilities and secure your financial future thanks to our targeted expertise in tax optimisation.
